test.command: cd /Users/lifan/dev/ai/apara/app && npx vitest run && cd /Users/lifan/dev/ai/apara/extension && npx vitest run

typecheck.command: cd /Users/lifan/dev/ai/apara/app && bunx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.app.json && bunx tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.server.json

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Allow backend-only features to satisfy manual verification with API-level checks (for example curl/assertion checks) instead of requiring agent-browser interaction.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review upload-size-limit reported that app-worker SKILL.md currently mandates agent-browser verification even for backend-only work; the feature handoff documented a necessary deviation with successful curl-based verification.
